assertions.description: PS1 (V78E05-500-SMT) has a power_out pin type in its KiCad symbol and is a switching regulator converting +12 V → +5 V. The signal_analysis.power_regulators list is empty in both the power sub-sheet and the top-level board analysis. The power budget therefore cannot account for PS1 as a supply source for the +5 V rail.
